## GOALS
- performance
Additional details: D3 college basketball player, in-season (12 weeks remaining). Need strength training that complements basketball - explosiveness, durability, injury prevention. Can't be too sore for games.

## TRAINING CONTEXT

### Schedule & Availability
- Desired training frequency: 2

### Experience
- Level: Intermediate
- Details: 3 years lifting experience. College basketball player (D3), currently in-season. Trains Mon/Thu at 2 PM, 45 min sessions between classes and practice.

### Equipment & Environment
- Training location: Commercial gym
- Setup details: University athletic facility - full athletic performance center with platforms, racks, sleds, plyo boxes
- Available equipment: barbells, Dumbbells, platforms, sleds, plyo_boxes

### Constraints
- Chronic ankle instability (tapes for games). Can't be too sore for basketball performance.

reference.response:
### IDENTITY
- **Name:** Brandon Taylor  
- **Age:** 22  
- **Gender:** Male  
- **Experience level:** **Intermediate** — ~3 years consistent lifting experience; D3 college basketball player, currently **in-season** (as of 2026-02-27)

---

### GOALS
- **Primary goal(s):** **Performance (in-season basketball)** — maintain/improve strength and power while prioritizing **explosiveness, durability, and injury prevention**, with training that **minimizes soreness** and does not negatively impact games/practices (as of 2026-02-27)
- **Secondary goals:**
  - Maintain lean mass/strength during season
  - Improve ankle/foot resilience and landing mechanics (as tolerated)
- **Target events/deadlines:** **In-season: ~12 weeks remaining** (as of 2026-02-27)

---

### TRAINING CONTEXT

#### Schedule & Availability
- **Available training days:** **2 days/week**
- **Planned lifting days:** **Mon + Thu**
- **Session duration:** **45 minutes**
- **Time window:** **2:00 PM** (between classes and practice)
- **In-season priority:** Keep fatigue low; avoid high-volume lower-body eccentrics close to games (noted constraint driver)

#### Equipment & Environment
- **Location:** Commercial gym — **university athletic performance facility**
- **Available equipment (confirmed):** barbells, dumbbells, platforms, racks, sleds, plyo boxes (full performance center)

#### Constraints
- **[ACTIVE]** Chronic ankle instability — tapes for games; needs ankle/foot stability emphasis and careful plyo/landing volume (since **2026-02-27**). Monitor tolerance and reinjury risk.
- **[ACTIVE]** Soreness/fatigue management constraint — training must not create excessive DOMS that compromises basketball performance (since **2026-02-27**).

#### Preferences
- **Training style preference (implied by goal):** Athletic performance emphasis (power, strength maintenance, durability), **low-to-moderate volume**, high intent, quality reps
- **Focus areas:** Explosiveness (jump/sprint qualities), posterior chain, single-leg stability, ankle/foot robustness, trunk control/anti-rotation

---

### METRICS
*(No performance metrics provided yet; placeholders created. Update when lifts/testing data are available.)*

**Endurance / Sport (Basketball)**
- In-season status: **Active roster, D3** (as of 2026-02-27)
- Minutes/game, jump testing, sprint times: **Not provided**

**Strength**
- Key lifts (trap bar DL, squat variant, bench, chin/pull-up, Olympic lift derivatives): **Not provided**
- Bodyweight strength (pull-ups, single-leg squat quality): **Not provided**

**Movement Quality**
- Ankle stability: **Chronic instability noted** (as of 2026-02-27)
- Pain status / ROM limitations: **Not provided**

**Body Composition**
- Weight / BF%: **Not provided**

---

### LOG
## 2026-02-27 — Profile created/updated (in-season basketball performance focus)
- Confirmed athlete context: **D3 college basketball**, **in-season with ~12 weeks remaining**
- Set training availability: **2x/week (Mon/Thu), 45 min at 2 PM**
- Equipment confirmed: full university performance center (barbells, DBs, platforms, racks, sleds, plyo boxes)
- Added constraints:
  - **Chronic ankle instability** (taped for games)
  - **Must minimize soreness** to protect on-court performance
- Metrics not yet supplied; awaiting current lift numbers and any jump/sprint/playing-load data

**Missing fields to complete consistency (send when available):** height, bodyweight, position, game schedule density (games/week), current lift numbers (or recent training loads), any current ankle pain level (0–10) and side (L/R), and any recent lower-body injuries (knees/hips/hamstrings).
